Bus Timings

Bus 175 Timings From Al Zeina to Children’s Garden

September 30, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Operational Details

Reg Bus 175 operates consistently throughout the day to meet the needs of commuters:

From Al Zeina From Children’s Garden
06:00 07:33
07:00 08:33
08:00 09:33
09:00 10:33
10:00 11:33
11:00 12:33
12:00 13:33
13:00 14:33
14:00 15:33
15:00 16:33
16:00 17:33
17:00 18:33
18:00 19:33
19:00 20:33
20:00 21:33
21:00 22:33
22:00 23:33
23:00 00:33

Download PDF Bus 175

Bus 175 Timetable

For full schedule details, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for 175 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: The fare for Reg Bus 175 is a flat AED 2.00, with an additional AED 0.05 per kilometer for longer distances. Passengers can conveniently pay using the Hafilat Smart Card, which can be topped up at multiple service points across the city. For detailed fare information and updates, visit the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport’s website.

Route Overview

Starting at Al Bateen, Al Bateen Street/Children’s Garden, Reg Bus 175 travels through several important destinations before reaching Al Zeina, a popular residential and commercial area. Here’s a breakdown of key stops along the route:

  1. Al Zeina A vibrant residential and commercial community by the waterfront.

  2. Al Raha Boulevard A bustling street lined with shops and cafes.

  3. Al Rahah Street A key thoroughfare connecting various residential and commercial areas.

  4. ALDAR HQ The iconic headquarters of Abu Dhabi’s leading property development company.

  5. Al Raha Mall A popular shopping destination for locals and tourists.

  6. Emirates Sailing School A hub for watersport enthusiasts and sailing lessons.

  7. Department Search and Rescue An important stop for emergency services and operations.

  8. Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque One of the largest and most famous landmarks in Abu Dhabi.

  9. Ministry of Interior The central hub for governmental administrative services.

  10. Al Noor Hospital A prominent healthcare facility in Abu Dhabi.

  11. Saif Ghobash Street A major road connecting different parts of the city.

  12. Rabdan Street A significant street running through commercial and residential areas.

  13. Mishrif Mall A convenient shopping center with a variety of retail outlets.

  14. Immigration Department The official stop for government immigration services.

  15. Mohammed Bin Khalifa Street A central street in the heart of Abu Dhabi.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Hazaa Bin Zayed Street A key location connecting various administrative offices.

  2. Al Falah Street A major thoroughfare serving both commercial and residential areas.

  3. Etisalat A landmark building housing one of the UAE’s largest telecom providers.

  4. Al Hisn Street A notable street in a well-known residential neighborhood.

  5. Jaber Al Hindi Mosque A peaceful mosque providing services to the local community.

  6. Mubarak Bin Mohammed Street A residential and commercial area in Abu Dhabi.

  7. Dana Plaza A popular spot for shopping and dining.

  8. Al Bateen Street A picturesque street in the prestigious Al Bateen district.

  9. Abu Dhabi — Children’s Garden A serene park designed for families and children.

Accessibility Features

Reg Bus 175 is designed with accessibility in mind, offering ramps, designated seating areas, and audio-visual aids for passengers with hearing or visual impairments. This ensures that all passengers, regardless of ability, can travel comfortably and safely throughout the city.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

This makes Reg Bus 175 an essential link in the city’s public transportation network.

Nearby Attractions

Some of the notable attractions and landmarks accessible via Reg Bus 175 include:

  • Al Bateen Street
  • Al Raha Mall
  • Emirates Sailing School These stops make Bus 175 a convenient choice for both locals and tourists.

Journey Experience

A trip on Bus 175 from Al Zeina to Children’s Garden offers a scenic and enjoyable journey, passing through a variety of vibrant cityscapes in Abu Dhabi. As the bus travels through the city, passengers get to experience a blend of modern and traditional architecture, showcasing Abu Dhabi’s unique urban development.

Along the way, you’ll pass notable landmarks, commercial hubs, and green spaces that highlight the city’s balance between urban living and nature. By the time the bus arrives at the charming Children’s Garden, which is ideal for family outings and picnics, travelers will have had a well-rounded view of some of the city’s key areas. This journey also provides glimpses of Abu Dhabi’s rich cultural heritage and the city’s continued growth.

Travel Tips

For a smooth journey, consider traveling during off-peak hours to avoid crowds. Keep your Hafilat Smart Card topped up to ensure you’re always ready to board, and check for real-time updates on the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport app. Additionally, always plan your route in advance to make the most of your trip and avoid any unexpected delays.

Reg Bus 175 offers a reliable, cost-effective, and eco-friendly solution for navigating Abu Dhabi. Whether you’re commuting to work, running errands, or exploring the city’s landmarks, this route ensures convenient access to key areas across the city. For more information and updates, consult the official resources provided by the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport, or explore the full Abu Dhabi bus routes for additional travel options.

Official UAE Sources

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: September 30, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
